ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Medical record number of the patient */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission to the hospital */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge from the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address for contact and emergency purposes */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number for communication */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any known allergies of the patient */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any pre-existing medical conditions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the patient record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the patient (e.g., admitted, discharged, transferred) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapy_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each therapy session */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient undergoing the therapy session */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the therapy session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the therapy session */,
  "therapist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapist conducting the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of therapy session (e.g., initial, follow-up, emergency) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the therapy session is conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the therapist regarding the session */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the session record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_therapy_sessions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_therapy_sessions_therapist_id FOREIGN KEY ("therapist_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respiratory_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respiratory parameter measurement */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapy session during which the parameter was measured */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the respiratory parameter */,
  "low" REAL /* Lower limit of the target range */,
  "target" REAL /* Target value of the parameter */,
  "high" REAL /* Upper limit of the target range */,
  "minimum_value" REAL /* Minimum value measured during the session */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average value measured during the session */,
  "maximum_value" REAL /* Maximum value measured during the session */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "min_time" TEXT /* Time at which the minimum value was recorded */,
  "max_time" TEXT /* Time at which the maximum value was recorded */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Exact time when each parameter was measured */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the parameter (e.g., normal, warning, critical) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message or note associated with the alert status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the parameter record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the parameter record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respiratory_parameters_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES therapy_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, therapist, nurse) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
